era: 1990-1994 core. Hard Rock. E=7 -- heavy, grinding, McMillan's voice. Capitol Hill. Roadrunner Records.

member_lineages.McMillan: from Skin Yard (1985-1993). Toured with Screaming Trees.
member_lineages.Paul: from The Accused (1981-1991, Seattle crossover thrash)

associated_musicians: Jack Endino (Skin Yard producer, later Sub Pop)

theory_nodes.concept: Roadrunner Records enters at 232. International metal label (Netherlands, 1980). Type O Negative labelmates. The metal vector in the engine's label map completes.
theory_nodes.description: Metal label from the Netherlands documents Seattle's heavy side.

theory_nodes.concept: Skin Yard lineage: Skin Yard (1985-1993, Jack Endino, McMillan) → Gruntruck (1990-1994). The pre-grunge underground metal tradition preserved through personnel.
theory_nodes.description: Seattle underground metal passes through McMillan.

theory_nodes.concept: The Accused lineage: Tim Paul from Seattle crossover thrash (1981-1991). The hardcore punk root of the Seattle underground reaches into Gruntruck's hard rock.
theory_nodes.description: Thrash/hardcore DNA in a hard rock band.

cross_references.relationship: E=6 alt rock precedes E=7 hard rock. Frontier to Roadrunner. Melodic to grinding.
Capitol Hill neighbor. Same neighborhood, opposite register: soulful vs. grinding.

sps_pair.pairing_note: E=7+E=6=E=13. Canyon specialist meets underground metal. Hard terrain in both domains.
